pageContext.name: M90 Mini Blaster x Big Power
pageContext.description: Sideshow and New Wave Toys are proud to present the M90 Mini Blaster, a miniaturized replica approximately 60% smaller and lighter than the original King of Boomboxes released in 1981!   The M90 Mini Blaster is designed to be played loud, featuring two 3 mid-range speakers that deliver a total of 30 watts of Big Power. The M90 mini Blaster is constructed from high-quality materials and is packed with features including independent bass and treble tone controls, a classic FM tuner, and comes complete with a replica wired remote control. A state-of-the-art rechargeable battery provides up to 40 hours of battery life with enough power to charge most USB-compatible devices.  Big Power is a collection of faithfully recreated iconic 1980's boomboxes at a fraction of the size and cost of original vintage boomboxes. Big Power blasters merge legendary boombox design with modern technology and are packed with traditional and contemporary features and accessories.   The M90 Mini Blaster comes with one Mini Wired Remote, four XL Tuning Knobs, one Mini Cassette & Jewel Case Props, one USB-C Charge Cable, one Replica Service Manual, and one Replica M90 Box.  Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
